seo.title: Marrow bones - rich, rich indulgence - Marinda Kook

html:
Look, to eat marrow bones, you need to be ready for it. It takes you deep. Eat the richness on coarse homemade bread.

  1. marrow bones
  2. olive oil
  3. coarse salt
  4. rosemary sprigsNOW
  • wash the marrow bones
  • in an ovenproof dish pour a little olive oil and pack the bones onto the olive oil
  • sprinkle coarse salt over and also a little olive oil
  • lay a rosemary sprig on top
  • bake for 40 minutes at 180 degrees Celsius

Eat the richness on coarse bread and forget all about the fall of man.
